name: Seven Seas Navigator
description: Seven Seas Navigator is Regent's most intimate ship, originally built on a Russian hull base by T. Mariotti in Genoa. Her smaller size allows access to ports that larger ships cannot reach, making her a favourite for exotic itineraries. Like all Regent ships, every suite has a private balcony and all dining, beverages, excursions, and gratuities are fully included in the fare.

name: Seven Seas Mariner
description: Seven Seas Mariner holds the distinction of being the world's first all-suite, all-balcony ship when she debuted in 2001 — a landmark achievement that redefined luxury cruising. Built by Chantiers de l'Atlantique in France, she features four specialty restaurants, a full-size Canyon Ranch Spa, and the most spacious suites at sea for her era. She underwent a comprehensive refurbishment in 2018.

name: Seven Seas Voyager
description: Seven Seas Voyager followed Seven Seas Mariner with the same all-suite, all-balcony concept refined further. Built by T. Mariotti in Genoa, she offers an elegant, spacious experience with multiple dining venues and the hallmark Regent all-inclusive package covering drinks, speciality dining, shore excursions, and flights. She was fully refurbished in 2019.

name: Seven Seas Explorer
description: Seven Seas Explorer was launched by Regent with the bold claim of being 'The Most Luxurious Ship Ever Built' — a claim backed by her extraordinary appointments: a Picasso lithograph displayed in the atrium, suites clad in marble and Italian fabrics, and a grand staircase inspired by the Paris Opéra. Built by Fincantieri in 2016, she set a new benchmark for luxury at sea and remains one of the finest ships afloat.

name: Seven Seas Splendor
description: Seven Seas Splendor is the sister ship to Seven Seas Explorer and was delivered by Fincantieri in Ancona in early 2020, just weeks before the global cruise industry paused due to COVID-19. She matches her sister's extraordinary luxury level and introduces the Regent Suite — spanning 4,443 square feet across two decks with a grand piano, private spa, and dedicated butler — one of the most opulent suites at sea.

name: Seven Seas Grandeur
description: Seven Seas Grandeur is Regent's newest and most refined ship, delivered by Fincantieri in 2023. She builds on the Explorer-class blueprint with elevated interiors, fresh dining concepts, and even more lavish suite designs. Her Regent Suite spans two full decks and over 4,000 square feet. Grandeur represents Regent's vision of the ideal luxury cruise ship — intimate enough to feel exclusive, spacious enough to feel palatial.
